top_10_high_priority.recommended_action: IMMEDIATE LEDGER SUSPENSION! Critical identity anomalies (missing or duplicate transaction IDs) detected. Freeze the accounting sub-ledger, halt payment processing, and perform a manual database key reconciliation.; [RV-01] - Verify original booking form. Patched transaction ID assigned. Reconcile with ERP sequence logs.; [RV-03] - Halt transaction. Missing Customer ID. Reconcile with CRM registration logs before payment clearance.; [RV-04] - Halt transaction. Missing Unit ID. Reconcile with property registry.; [RV-05] - Halt transaction. Missing Project ID. Reconcile with master project list.; [RV-14] - Over-collection Flag. Reconcile collected amount; check if refund is required.; [RV-27] - Future-dated payment warning. Verify post-dated check authorization schedules.; [RV-32] - Verify holiday/weekend collection voucher. Confirm bank clearings and check deposit timestamps.; [SOP-ML-OUTLIER] - ML Outlier Reconciliations: Abnormal combination of abnormal invoice-to-payment window and Temporal Behavior

IMMEDIATE LEDGER SUSPENSION! Critical identity anomalies (missing or duplicate transaction IDs) detected. Freeze the accounting sub-ledger, halt payment processing, and perform a manual database key reconciliation.; [RV-02] - Duplicate ID threat. Reconcile unit ledger balances and check for duplicate billing vouchers.; [RV-03] - Halt transaction. Missing Customer ID. Reconcile with CRM registration logs before payment clearance.; [RV-04] - Halt transaction. Missing Unit ID. Reconcile with property registry.; [RV-20] - Credit Balance Flag. Negative outstanding balance. Reconcile over-collections.; [RV-35] - Multiple demand amounts logged on identical transaction ID. Reconcile invoices immediately.; [SOP-GW-AML] - Reconcile source of funds. Reconcile check deposit receipts, verify customer KYC profiles, and file anti-money laundering (AML) regulatory review.; [SOP-ML-OUTLIER] - ML Outlier Reconciliations: Abnormal combination of financial and temporal behavior
